items.name: Kimchi Jjigae
items.description: Spicy fermented kimchi stew with pork belly, tofu, served with rice.

items.name: Doenjang Jjigae
items.description: Fermented soybean paste stew, tofu, zucchini, potatoes, served with rice.

items.name: Sundubu Jjigae
items.description: Silky soft tofu stew, egg, choice of seafood, beef, or vegetables, served with rice.

items.name: Budae Jjigae
items.description: Army stew with spam, sausage, kimchi, ramen noodles, cheese.

items.name: Galbi Tang
items.description: Beef short rib soup, radish, glass noodles, served with rice.

items.name: Samgyetang
items.description: Whole Cornish hen stuffed with rice, ginseng, jujube, garlic.

items.name: Bibimbap
items.description: Rice topped with seasoned vegetables, egg, gochujang. Choice of beef, chicken, or tofu.

items.name: Dolsot Bibimbap
items.description: Sizzling stone pot bibimbap with crispy rice, vegetables, egg, gochujang.

items.name: Kimchi Fried Rice
items.description: Stir-fried rice with kimchi, vegetables, fried egg, choice of protein.

items.name: Japchae
items.description: Sweet potato noodles, mixed vegetables, soy sesame dressing.

items.name: Jajangmyeon
items.description: Black bean sauce noodles, diced pork, zucchini, potatoes.

items.name: Beef Bulgogi
items.description: Marinated sliced beef, steamed rice, lettuce wraps, banchan.

items.name: Spicy Pork
items.description: Gochujang marinated pork, steamed rice, lettuce wraps, banchan.

items.name: Chicken Teriyaki
items.description: Grilled chicken thighs, teriyaki glaze, steamed rice, salad.

items.name: Korean Fried Chicken
items.description: Crispy double-fried chicken, soy garlic or spicy sauce.

items.name: Mandu
items.description: Steamed or pan-fried dumplings, soy dipping sauce.

items.name: Pajeon
items.description: Crispy green onion and seafood pancake.

items.name: Tteokbokki
items.description: Spicy rice cakes in gochujang sauce.
